positive: A retro 80s vaporwave design featuring a geometric grid landscape, a stylized sunset, and a chrome silhouette of a palm tree. Neon pink, electric blue, and cyan color palette. Synthwave aesthetic, highly symmetrical, vector art, digital poster print.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realism, messy lines
